packageRules.description: Automerge non-major updates for stable (>=1.0.0) packages once tests pass
Automerge all devDependencies updates once tests pass
Automerge GitHub Actions digest, patch and minor updates

Automerge Docker digest and patch updates only. Minor is excluded: in docker versioning a language feature-line bump (e.g. python:3.14-slim -> 3.15-slim) is a 'minor', but the docker-build check only assembles the image while host CI pins Python 3.14 — so a runtime minor must be reviewed manually, not automerged untested.

GHCR does not expose release timestamps, so under Renovate 42 the minimumReleaseAge check can never pass and internalChecksFilter=strict would stop these branches from ever being created (e.g. ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv). Exempt GHCR images from the age gate so they keep updating; they remain digest-pinned and CI-gated.
Require manual review for all major updates

Stay on TypeScript 6.x: the 7.x native-Go port has no stable programmatic API, so svelte-check / @sveltejs/kit (which embed the compiler) break under it. Revisit once the Svelte toolchain adopts the TS 7 API.
